## Summary

Briefly explain what changed and why.

## What changed?

List the main files, pages or workflows changed.

## Database impact

Describe any SQL, repository query or database configuration changes.

## Testing completed

- [ ] Ruff check completed
- [ ] Black check completed
- [ ] Pytest completed
- [ ] Manual browser check completed where relevant

## Notes for reviewers

Call out anything that is intentionally incomplete or planned for later work.
